vulnerabilities.title: Content Security Policy (CSP) Header Not Set
vulnerabilities.description: Content Security Policy header is not included in the HTTP response.
vulnerabilities.fix_recommendation: Set a CSP header in the HTTP response: Content-Security-Policy: default-src 'self'

vulnerabilities.title: Missing Anti-clickjacking Header
vulnerabilities.description: The response does not include X-Frame-Options or Content-Security-Policy frame-ancestors.
vulnerabilities.fix_recommendation: Add X-Frame-Options: DENY or Content-Security-Policy: frame-ancestors 'none' to HTTP responses.

vulnerabilities.title: X-Content-Type-Options Header Missing
vulnerabilities.description: The Anti-MIME-Sniffing header X-Content-Type-Options was not set to 'nosniff'.
vulnerabilities.fix_recommendation: Set X-Content-Type-Options: nosniff in all HTTP responses.
